message:
feat(array): implement PostgreSQL ARRAY type support (bd-bp7l)

Add Value::Array conversions and array-specific query operations:

- From<Vec<T>> for Value: String, i32, i64, f64, bool
- TryFrom<Value> for Vec<T>: String, i32, i64, bool
- Expr array ops: array_contains (@>), array_contained_by (<@),
  array_overlap (&&), array_any_eq (= ANY())
- BinaryOp variants: ArrayContains, ArrayContainedBy, ArrayOverlap
- SqlType::Array and Value::Array already existed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
